highlights: Architected and developed a serverless web application from the ground up using React, Python, and AWS, transitioning the project toward an official LLC launch.
Engineered an automated, cost-effective media processing pipeline utilizing AWS Lambda and S3 to handle user uploads, transcoding, and thumbnail generation.
Designed a fully responsive, mobile-friendly frontend architecture using React and Bootstrap to optimize the user experience and interface consistency.
Led an engineering team in the full-cycle development of a virtual reality application using Unreal Engine, C++, Blueprints, and Perforce.
Architected and maintained the codebase for two simultaneous projects, establishing technical documentation and system design standards to streamline future development.
Analyzed user testing data and rapidly iterated on core features, resulting in an increase to over 85% positive user sentiment.
Engineered scalable frontend features for AVEVA Insight, an enterprise cloud platform for industrial data visualization, using Angular and TypeScript.
Standardized component-level unit testing using Cypress, significantly improving CI/CD pipeline consistency.
Debugged key frontend components and widgets, promoting user stability and reliability of backend communication.

Steel Heel Jam.title: Steel Heel Jam
Steel Heel Jam.subtitle: 3D Platform Fighter
Steel Heel Jam.preview: A highly scalable 3D platform fighter featuring custom physics and a state-driven combat architecture.
Steel Heel Jam.description: A competitive 3D platform fighter developed in Unity, featuring complex state-driven combat systems and scalable local multiplayer support. Built with a focus on performance optimization and dynamic environmental mechanics to ensure smooth execution at high player counts.
highlights: Developed a scalable 2-8 player local multiplayer architecture, optimizing physics and rendering for consistent high frame rates.
Engineered an efficient state-machine-driven character controller handling combat mechanics including combos, projectiles, and grapples.
Designed and implemented a dynamic arena system that computationally scales environmental constraints in real-time based on match state.

3D Renderer.title: 3D Game Framework
3D Renderer.subtitle: C++ & DirectX 11 Graphics
3D Renderer.preview: A 3D game framework showcasing fundamental graphics pipeline architecture and real-time computation.
3D Renderer.description: A proprietary 3D rendering engine built from scratch using C++ and DirectX 11. Designed to demonstrate a deep understanding of the low-level graphics pipeline, encompassing custom HLSL shaders, engine-native physics simulations, and a bespoke material architecture.
highlights: Architected a custom 3D game framework in C++ and DirectX 11, implementing core graphics pipeline stages and HLSL shaders.
Developed mathematical primitives and algorithms for an engine-native physics and collision detection system.
Engineered a flexible material architecture and optimized render loop capable of efficiently drawing complex 3D geometry in real-time.

Zelda Finder.title: Zelda Finder
Zelda Finder.subtitle: API-Driven Search Engine
Zelda Finder.preview: An interactive, API-driven web application built with vanilla Web Components and real-time cloud integration.
Zelda Finder.description: An interactive, API-driven web application built with custom JavaScript Web Components. The platform integrates responsive design principles and real-time cloud database synchronization via Firebase to deliver a seamless and persistent data querying experience.
highlights: Built an asynchronous Single Page Application (SPA) using vanilla JavaScript and custom Web Components to interface with external REST APIs.
Integrated Firebase Cloud Firestore and local storage to manage user state, enabling real-time synchronization of user favorites across sessions.
Designed a responsive, modular user interface using Bulma CSS, ensuring cross-device compatibility and optimized DOM updates.

Amiibo Finder.title: Amiibo Finder
Amiibo Finder.subtitle: Data Parsing & Search Tool
Amiibo Finder.preview: A responsive data discovery tool optimized for complex client-side parsing and external dataset filtering.
Amiibo Finder.description: A highly responsive data discovery web application optimized for parsing and filtering extensive external datasets. The tool features advanced client-side search algorithms and dynamic routing to retail endpoints, showcasing efficient data pipeline management.
highlights: Engineered a client-side data processing pipeline in JavaScript to asynchronously fetch, parse, and filter large JSON datasets from external APIs.
Developed a multi-parameter search and filtering algorithm to provide instantaneous query results based on complex user criteria.
Constructed a dynamic DOM manipulation system to generate responsive UI elements and route users to external retail endpoints.

AWS Solutions Architect.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate
AWS Solutions Architect.description: This certification validates my ability to design and deploy secure and robust applications on AWS technologies.
highlights: Demonstrated proficiency in architecting distributed systems on AWS.
Validated expertise in AWS security, networking, and storage best practices.
Certified capability in building resilient, high-performance infrastructures.

IBM Full Stack Developer.title: IBM Full Stack Software Developer
IBM Full Stack Developer.description: A comprehensive certification covering the entire development lifecycle, from cloud-native apps to CI/CD pipelines.
highlights: Mastered containerization and orchestration with Docker and Kubernetes.
Developed full-stack proficiency in modern web technologies and databases.
Certified in cloud-native application development and DevOps methodologies.
